source.schemaPurpose: static event/object-code lifecycle mapping for clean-room planning, not runtime proof

lifecycleSteps.evidence: stores owner/script pointers, writes IScript back-pointer at script_object_code+0x68, initializes listener/state set at this+0x28
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact IScript concrete layout and runtime script startup behavior remain unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: registered PostEvent handler allocates a 0x0c-byte payload, reads the event name/reference through datatype getter +0x48, links through DAT_00855190, and schedules CEventManager__AddEvent_AtTime(...,2000,&DAT_0089c590,-1.0,0,payload,0)
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact event payload layout and runtime scheduler timing remain unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: matches listener names with datatype/string vtable getter +0x38, allocates listener/function wrapper nodes, and stores CEventFunction references in listener lists
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact listener node layout and string lifetime remain unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: warns when no listener is available unless event_name is game playing, matches event names, marks matching listener entries, and calls CEventFunction__Execute
lifecycleSteps.boundary: runtime posted-event delivery and mission outcome behavior remain unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: walks event parameter wrappers, stages up to the observed local 10-slot array, and calls CScriptObjectCode__CallEventDirect
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact parameter payload semantics and parameter-count safety remain unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: looks up event instruction pointers from script_object_code+0x14+event_index*4, pushes parameters when present, and calls CScriptObjectCode__Run
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact event table layout and runtime VM behavior remain unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: pushes supplied parameters, writes runtime_state+0x214 with the direct instruction index, and calls CScriptObjectCode__Run
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact event-function parameter ownership remains unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: waits for the existing worker, copies filename to this+0x20, stores buffer_size at this+0x124, starts the worker, then LoadAsync creates a CDXMemBuffer and initializes it from the stored path
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact async-cache ownership and live script-loading behavior remain unproven

lifecycleSteps.evidence: clears the HUD/object-code field block, frees object-code pointer slots through the memory manager, releases auxiliary slots, and nulls fields as they are released
lifecycleSteps.boundary: exact HUD field-block and object-code-record layouts remain unproven

corpusContext.boundary: loose corpus evidence only until packed-vs-loose selection and live loading are proven

claims: The saved static event/object-code lifecycle has a bounded chain from IScript owner linkage through PostEvent scheduling, CScriptEventNB listener dispatch, CEventFunction execution, CScriptObjectCode event-call helpers, and CMissionScriptObjectCode async load/teardown helpers.
The schema preserves lifecycle anchors and row counts from saved Ghidra exports without mutating Ghidra or executing BEA.
The schema keeps exact event payload, listener, async-cache, object-code, VM, and source layouts outside the static claim.
